author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #6 is happening this Wednesday!  

The Atlas Brew is a new Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel 

In these events we will talk about different Star Atlas topics that the community will decide beforehand on ⁠No Access channel, as well as theorycrafting and even helping newcomers who need a little bit of guidance in the Star Atlas Metaverse 

Our next episode of Atlas Brew will be about LORE! We will discuss the epic background in which our community will be inserted, the nature of the Star Atlas Galaxy, its factions, leaders, races, morals, and much more! Our home noot @⪛⦿⫺ZeSKK will also disclose a bit of what he is working on right now you don't want to miss this! 

See you on Wednesday at 2200 UTC!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/953291948909805569

Mentions: @⪛⦿⫺ZeSKK
